headline: A Look At Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Strength
summary: Why Archer-Daniels-Midland Stock Is Getting Attention Now Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) has drawn fresh interest after a period of strong recent returns, with the stock up over the past month, past 3 months, year to date, and over the past year. Those moves come alongside annual revenue of about US$80.6b and net income of roughly US$1.1b. This gives investors a large, diversified agribusiness with multiple operating segments to evaluate.
